name: Franklin Ben Johns Signature
description: Designed in collaboration with pro player Ben Johns, the Franklin Signature paddle combines a MaxGrit textured surface with a polypropylene honeycomb core for exceptional spin generation and shot control. The elongated shape extends reach without adding excessive weight, ideal for singles play.
care_instructions: Clean with a damp microfiber cloth. The MaxGrit surface is durable but avoid scraping against rough surfaces. Replace the grip wrap every 3-6 months depending on play frequency.
